name: 反派落網
description: Cora在眾人面前被警察帶走，從囂張到崩潰的轉變讓觀眾的積怨得到宣洩。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Miss Cora, standing in front of the police. Come on. Let go of me. Let go of me. Obviously, all of this is mine. / You're a liar. Get her out of here.
